subcodes.first_line: Ponder, O My loved ones, upon this wondrous One through Whom the decree of creation hath been made manifest. Blessed is he who hath recognized and proclaimed: "Thine be the glory!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تفکروا یا احبائی فی هذا البدیع الذی به ظهر حکم البدع طوبی لمن عرف و قال لک
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @contemplation, @station of the Manifestation of God
